reason_template: UV lights are an add-on that most homeowners don't need with a standard AC install. They add significant cost with marginal air quality benefit for typical households.
when_actually_needed: If household members have severe allergies, respiratory conditions, or if you have documented mold issues in the ductwork.

reason_template: Duct cleaning is frequently upsold with every HVAC service call but EPA states it should only be done if ducts are actually contaminated.
when_actually_needed: If you see visible mold growth, pest infestation evidence, or excessive debris causing restricted airflow.

reason_template: Water softeners are frequently pitched during basic plumbing repairs. They're only beneficial if your water hardness level is actually high.
when_actually_needed: If you have a water hardness test showing hard water (>7 grains per gallon) and are experiencing scale buildup on fixtures.

reason_template: Whole-home surge protectors are often added to single outlet repairs. They're a useful product but shouldn't be impulse-purchased during an unrelated service call.
when_actually_needed: If you live in an area with frequent lightning strikes, have expensive electronics, or have sensitive medical equipment.

reason_template: Annual maintenance plans are commonly sold at point of one-time repair. They can provide value but should be evaluated separately, not under pressure during a repair visit.
when_actually_needed: Maintenance plans can be worth it for aging equipment nearing end of life or if you prefer predictable costs. Compare against annual tune-up cost first.

reason_template: Condensate line treatment packages are rarely necessary and often a simple pour-in tablet that costs pennies is sold at a significant markup.
when_actually_needed: Only if you've had repeated condensate line clogs. Can DIY with a $1 algae tablet from hardware store.

reason_template: Ductwork modifications during equipment replacement are sometimes necessary but frequently oversold. Get a second opinion if modifications are recommended on relatively new ductwork.
when_actually_needed: If ductwork is undersized for new equipment, has major leaks (>25% loss), or is damaged/deteriorated after 20+ years.

reason_template: Whole-home air purifiers are often added to standard AC installs. They provide air quality benefits but are frequently priced at a significant premium and may not be needed for average households.
when_actually_needed: If household members have severe allergies, asthma, or if you live in an area with high pollution or frequent wildfire smoke.
